zh.lifeSummary: 當Archbishop Edwin Sandys於1519年7月10日出生在英國藍卡爾霍可黑阿德時，他的父親William Sandys26歲，母親Margaret Dixon22歲。他於大約1548年與Mary Sandys結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1577年在英國越可爾約克被列為archbishop of york。他去世於1588年7月10日在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾素維爾享年69歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾素維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Archbishop Edwin Sandys于1519年7月10日出生在英国藍卡爾霍可黑阿德时，他的父亲William Sandys26岁，母亲Margaret Dixon22岁。他于大约1548年与Mary Sandys结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1577年在英国越可爾約克被列为archbishop of york。他去世于1588年7月10日在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾素維爾享年69岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾素維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Sandys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sands
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name from Middle English sandes ‘sands’, for someone who lived at or near a sandy place, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Sands in Carlisle (Cumberland) or Sands Cottages in West Hoathly (Sussex). See Sand , of which Sands may sometimes be a plural form or a variant, with excrescent -s. Compare also Sandes and Sandys .

History: Comfort Sands, a revolutionary patriot born in 1748 at what is now Sands’ Point, Long Island, NY, was descended from James Sand(y)s (1622–95), who emigrated from Reading, Berkshire, England, to Plymouth, MA, and followed Anne Hutchinson to Westchester County, NY, and subsequently RI. In 1661 he settled on Block Island, RI.

nameMeanings.name: Edwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + wine ‘friend’. It was borne by a 7th-century king of Northumbria, who was converted to Christianity by St Paulinus and was killed in battle against pagan forces, a combination of circumstances which led to his being venerated as a martyr. The name occurs occasionally from the mid 16th century, but in modern use it is largely the result of a 19th-century revival.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Archbishop Edwin Sandys was born on 10 July 1519, in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England, his father, William Sandys, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Dixon, was 22. He married Mary Sandys about 1548. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1577, his occupation is listed as archbishop of york in York, Yorkshire, England. He died on 10 July 1588, in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Archbishop Edwin Sandys est né le 10 juillet 1519, à Hawkshead, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William Sandys, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Dixon, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Mary Sandys environ 1548. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1577, sa profession de son indiquée est archbishop of york à York, Everwyck, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 10 juillet 1588, à Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Archbishop Edwin Sandys am 10. Juli 1519 in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Sandys 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Dixon 22. Er hat um 1548 Mary Sandys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1577 ist sein Beruf als archbishop of york in York, Yorkshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 10. Juli 1588 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Archbishop Edwin Sandys è nato il il 10 luglio 1519 nel Hawkshead, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William Sandys, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Dixon, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Mary Sandys circa 1548. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Nel 1577, la sua occupazione è indicata come archbishop of york nel York, Yorkshire, England. Morì il 10 luglio 1588, nel Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Archbishop Edwin Sandysが1519年7月10日にイギリスランカシュアイアハウクシェアドで生まれた時，父William Sandysは26歳，母Margaret Dixonは22歳であった。約1548年にMary Sandysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1577年，イギリスヨークシュアイアヨークでの職業はarchbishop of yorkと記録されている。彼は1588年7月10日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアソウスウエルで69歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアソウスウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Archbishop Edwin Sandys(이)가 1519년 7월 10일 영국 랭카실르 호크셰아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Sandys(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Dixon(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1548년 Mary Sandys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1577년, 그의 직업은 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 archbishop of york이었다. 그는 1588년 7월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 소우스웰에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 소우스웰에 묻혔다.

pt.10 July 1519–10 July 1588: 10 de julho de 1519–10 de julho de 1588
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Archbishop Edwin Sandys nasceu em 10 de julho de 1519, em Hawkshead, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Sandys, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Dixon, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Sandys aproximadamente 1548. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1577, sua profissão aparece como archbishop of york em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 10 de julho de 1588, em Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Archbishop Edwin Sandys родился 10 июля 1519 г. в местности ховкшид, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Sandys было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Dixon, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Sandys около 1548 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1577 году он работал по профессии archbishop of york в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия. Он умер 10 июля 1588 г. в местности соутвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности соутвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.10 July 1519–10 July 1588: 10 de julio de 1519–10 de julio de 1588
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Archbishop Edwin Sandys nació el 10 de julio de 1519, en Hawkshead, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Sandys, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Dixon, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Mary Sandys aproximadamente 1548. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. En 1577, su ocupación registrada era archbishop of york en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 10 de julio de 1588, en Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
